title: Placement Statistics
content: Placement Statistics Placement Highlights-JUIT Solan B.Tech–2025 Mean Salary 7.18 LPA Median Salary 6.5 LPA Highest Salary - 50 LPA by Google 2nd Highest Salary – 46.38 LPA by Amazon 3rd Highest Salary – 29.5 LPA by Amazon 4th Highest Salary – 19.5 LPA by Zscaler 5th Highest Salary – 18 LPA by AtomicWork PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT Solan 2021-25 as on 12/05/2026 PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT, SOLAN 2021-25 Branch Total Eligible Participating Students No. of Absolute Offers % of Absolute Offers No. of Total Offers % of Total Offers CSE 248 240 97% 284 115% ECE 4 4 100% 4 100% ECM 10 10 100% 13 130% IT 25 24 96% 28 112% BT/BI 14 10 71% 12 86% CIVIL 11 11 100% 13 118% Total 312 299 96%* 354 113% * Placements for 2025 batch is still going on Placement Highlights-JUIT Solan B.Tech–2024 Mean Salary 6.81 LPA Median Salary 6.5 LPA Highest Salary -
